/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/detail/terrain_grid__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/detail/led_detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/detail/led_detection_array__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
